response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic workflows and event-driven architectures is relevant, though not at the scale or seniority required for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven track record in designing and scaling event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Diverse technical leadership in high-performance engineering teams (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or board-level communication)
Limited fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or real-time financial risk modeling)
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical (e.g., tooling/frameworks) rather than production-grade, high-stakes deployments

key_factors.factor: distributed systems and event-driven architecture expertise
